title: Firebase
body:
# Revisiting Firebase

Today I saw the need to revisit Googles Firebase Studio for a personal tool I am building. The tool itself is just a simple task tracking tool. The last time I used Firebase was around 2022 for a project I did in my penultimate semester during my bachelors in Monash University. The whole experience of the app has changed and everything is powered by Gemini now. So basically I was able to just prompt my way to setting up the project -> database -> authentication -> web app. The whole process took like 3-4 minutes which was insane to me as last I remember it was super tedious to set up a simple project on cloud. 

I have been using Supabase pretty often these days but this new version of Firebase really wants me to go to back to building apps around it.
